data.title: MaxLinear, Inc. Announces Conference Call to Review Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: MaxLinear will be hosting an earnings conference call on July 23, 2026, at 1:30pm PDT/4:30pm EDT. The call will provide an opportunity to discuss the company's financial results and performance.

data.title: Vanguard to Serve as Alternate Fund Partner for Trump Accounts
data.description: Vanguard has decided to facilitate Trump Account rollovers following direction from the Treasury Department. The U.S. Treasury Department has chosen Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF (VTI) as an alternative investment option for the aforementioned accounts.

data.title: BitGo Adds Day-One Support for Robinhood Chain Mainnet
data.description: BitGo Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BTGO) revealed its immediate backing of the Robinhood Chain mainnet, allowing institutional clients to utilize secure wallet and custody services for a Layer 2 network catering to financial services and tokenized real-world assets. With this integration, BitGo clients can establish wallets, oversee keys, and handle qualified ERC-20 assets on Robinhood Chain via BitGo’s platform. This move signifies a crucial step for institutional clients in managing digital assets efficiently and securely.

data.title: FICO Applauds Release of Historical FICO Score 10T Data by Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac
data.description: Data on loan performance spanning over ten years has been recently disclosed to promote the assessment and acceptance of FICO Score 10T.

data.title: Venice AI worth $1B with CEO Erik Voorhees advocating for privacy in ChatGPT competitors.
data.description: The valuation of Venice recently hit $1 billion, with founder Erik Voorhees advocating for AI companies to prioritize safeguarding users' conversations.

data.title: NexusTek Powers Healthcare's HIPAA-Aligned Future
data.description: Healthcare IT and cybersecurity services are aiding mid-market providers in addressing compliance and security issues without establishing an enterprise IT team. NexusTek, a prominent provider of secure, scalable IT solutions based in Greenwood Village, Colorado, announced this initiative on July 1, 2026, through a press release in PRNewswire. The company aims to assist healthcare organizations in improving their IT infrastructure and cybersecurity measures to ensure compliance and data protection. This move is crucial as it helps close gaps in security and compliance for providers who may not have the resources to build a dedicated IT team.

data.title: Viper Energy, Inc., a Subsidiary of Diamondback Energy, Inc., Has Completed Its Acquisition of Riverbend Mineral and Royalty Interests
data.description: In Midland, Texas, on July 01, 2026, Viper Energy, Inc. announced the completion of its acquisition of all equity interests of Riverbend Oil & Gas IX, L.L.C. The acquisition, known as the Riverbend Acquisition, was finalized for $337 million in cash and roughly 3.7 million shares of Viper’s Class A common stock, with customary post-closing adjustments. The cash portion of the acquisition was funded using a mix of available cash and borrowings under Viper’s credit facility. Viper Energy, Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Diamondback Energy, Inc., listed on NASDAQ under the tickers VNOM and FANG respectively.

data.title: Guardian Pharmacy Services Expands Virginia Footprint With Acquisition of Wellness Concepts
data.description: In Atlanta, Guardian Pharmacy Services, Inc. has completed the acquisition of Wellness Concepts, a long-term care pharmacy located in Grottoes, Virginia. Guardian Pharmacy Services, Inc., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol GRDN, successfully expanded its portfolio through this acquisition. This strategic move signifies growth opportunities for Guardian Pharmacy Services, Inc. and strengthens its presence in the long-term care pharmacy sector.

data.title: Phaser Studio Launches Game Agent: Build a Complete Video Game From a Single Sentence
data.description: In San Francisco on July 1, 2026, Phaser Studio Inc. introduced a new AI tool called the Phaser Game Agent, associated with the popular open-source Phaser game framework. This tool is capable of transforming a single sentence input into a fully developed and playable video game. Users simply describe the type of game they desire, and the Phaser Game Agent takes care of the rest, utilizing advanced artificial intelligence technology for game creation. This innovative tool has garnered attention for its ability to streamline and simplify the game development process.

data.title: Sierra7 Achieves CMMC Level 2 Certification, Strengthening Cybersecurity for Federal Clients
data.description: Sierra7, Inc., headquartered in McLean, Virginia, disclosed on July 1, 2026, that it has reached a crucial accomplishment by obtaining Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) Level 2 (ML2). This achievement highlights the company's dedication to safeguarding critical federal data.

data.title: Granite JV Wins Preconstruction CMAR Contract for Reno Bridge Project
data.description: In Watsonville, California, Granite (NYSE: GVA) revealed that Keystone Bridge Partners, a Granite-led venture with Condon-Johnson & Associates, Inc., has been chosen by the Regional Transportation Commission (RTC) of Washoe County for preconstruction duties for the Keystone Avenue Bridge Replacement Project in Reno, Nevada. The project, originally constructed in 1966, involves replacing the Keystone Avenue Bridge, which crosses the T. It will follow the Construction Manager at Risk (CMAR) approach.

data.title: Stratus Properties Inc. Announces Initial Liquidating Distribution of $5.00 Per Share to Stockholders and Intention to Voluntarily Delist From Nasdaq and Deregister With SEC
data.description: Stratus Properties Inc. disclosed in Austin, Texas that, as part of its Plan of Liquidation, the Board of Directors declared an initial liquidating distribution through a special cash dividend of $5.00 per share on the common stock (NASDAQ: STRS). This dividend will be paid on July 20, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of July 13, 2026. The decision was reached unanimously by the Board in relation to the Company's liquidation and dissolution plan.

data.title: Materion Corporation to Participate in CJS Securities’ 26th Annual Summer Conference on July 9
data.description: Materion Corporation (NYSE: MTRN) based in Mayfield Heights, Ohio, will be taking part in the CJS Securities’ 26th Annual Summer Conference on July 9, 2026. President and CEO Jugal Vijayvargiya, along with Vice President of Finance and CFO Shelly Chadwick, will be present for individual investor meetings on that day. Materion Corporation, specializing in advanced materials for high-performance industries, offers global solutions.

data.title: Newmont Announces Second Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) is set to announce its second quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, July 23, 2026, following the close of North American markets. The earnings conference call to discuss these results will take place at 5:30 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time on the same day, equivalent to 7:30 a.m. Australian Eastern Standard Time on Friday, July 24, 2026. The webcast replay will be accessible through the Company’s website under the title "Newmont’s Second Quarter 2026 Result."

data.title: O’Reilly Automotive, Inc. Announces Dates for Its Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: O’Reilly Automotive, Inc., a prominent player in the automotive aftermarket sector, based in Springfield, Missouri, has set the release date for its second quarter results in 2026. The company, listed on Nasdaq under the symbol ORLY, disclosed that the results will be made public on July 29, 2026. Following this announcement, a conference call is scheduled for July 30, 2026, where executives are expected to discuss and provide insights on the financial performance for the mentioned period. This update signifies an important milestone for O’Reilly Automotive, Inc., and stakeholders are eagerly anticipating the upcoming financial report and conference call.

data.title: Genesis Energy L.P.’s 2025 Schedule K-3 Now Available
data.description: Houston-based Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) released its 2025 Schedule K-3 for international tax information. The schedule can be accessed online at www.taxpackagesupport.com/Genesis or through the “K-1 Tax Information” link on the company's website, www.genesisenergy.com. Foreign unitholders and those calculating a foreign tax credit are among those who may need this information. The Schedule K-3 provides essential details for unitholders and is available for reference.

data.title: Talos Energy Announces Pricing of Offering of $800 Million of Second-Priority Senior Secured Notes due 2034
data.description: Talos Energy Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, Talos Production Inc., recently priced an offering of $800 million in new 8.000% notes. The announcement came on July 1, 2026, making it a significant development for the company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TALO.

SOFTBANK IS IN TALKS TO SECURE A $10 BILLION MARGIN LOAN BACKED BY ITS OPENAI STAKE, AFTER EARLIER FINANCING EFFORTS STALLED DUE TO LIMITED LENDER SUPPORT. GOLDMAN SACHS, JPMORGAN, AND MIZUHO ARE EXPECTED TO JOIN THE LENDING CONSORTIUM, ACCORDING TO REUTERS.

data.title: Merritt Properties Secures $750 Million Investment Led by Centerbridge
data.description: In a recent press release on July 1, 2026, Merritt Properties revealed a major strategic investment totaling $750 million. This significant commitment, spearheaded by Centerbridge Partners, L.P., aims to accelerate Merritt's expansion initiatives in the industrial sector, particularly focusing on the growth of their Shallow Bay Industrial presence in current and prospective markets. This substantial infusion of capital underscores Merritt's ambitions to solidify its position and enhance operations within the industry, promising to drive substantial growth and opportunities for the company in the foreseeable future.

data.title: COPT Defense Provides Conference Call Details to Discuss 2Q 2026 Results
data.description: In Columbia, Maryland, COPT Defense Properties (NYSE: CDP) disclosed the schedule for the discussion on their second quarter 2026 financial results. The Results Release Date is set for Monday, July 27, 2026, post-market closure, with the Conference Call scheduled for the next day, Tuesday, July 28, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Those interested in participating in the call must register via the provided link to obtain the dial-in number and personal pin for access.
